title: The seeder fleet, to a coverage gate
iter_summary: iter-01 (tok): TOK-01 strategy + reachability survey + corrected 3 catalog table names
iter-02: jobsim-sessions (1980 backdated sessions) — coverage 40%->50%; fixed introspect-load harness bug
iter-03: skillpath-sessions (1024) — 50%->60%; fixed a real UNIQUE(user,path,version) constraint
iter-05: activity (4000, FK->sessions) — 70%->80%; full believability core complete

gate_outcome_ledger.b_coverage: MET-over-reachable — 100% over the 8 non-waived surfaces (critical 100%); taxonomy+content waived

waived.taxonomy: needs the pre-embedded skiller node-hierarchy snapshot (empty in demo-1) — structural-snapshot work
waived.content: the shared Directus instance — isolation guard blocks live writes; snapshot-replay only
waived.rationale: M7c's declared hard line (seeds structural data, not the 60K-skill taxonomy nor shared Directus); ~v1.2
waived.machine_visible: recorded as waived-m7c status + Note in data-dna.json; excluded from DNA.Coverage() denominator

the_pattern: deterministic backdated-activity generator — time-distributed over the activity span, pass/fail per pass_rate, content refs (sim_id/skill_path_id/resource_id) as FREE values (no DB FK) so reachable without Directus; bulk COPY
perf: full 8-seeder seed (~8500 rows across 5 schemas) in 0.69s (gate <2min)
bugs_caught_live: skillpath UNIQUE(user_id, skill_path_id, version) collision — fixed by indexing the path by session number
datadna introspect Validate-before-load — a freshly-promoted seeded surface couldn't load; introspect now loads without Validate
harness_added: the waived-* status + DNA.Coverage()/Waived() + the catalog WAIVED section (keeps the manifest honest about the hard line)

decisions.TOK-01: sequence by reachability; believability core reachable without Directus; taxonomy/content snapshot-blocked tail
